title: paraprasophyllum litorale
intro: Paraprasophyllum litorale, also known as the coastal paraprasophyllum, is a species of orchid native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Herbal preparations of Paraprasophyllum litorale can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
